name: obsidian-kb
description: Knowledge base management via Obsidian vault for Claude Code and Codex

interface.longDescription: Ingest sources, distill conversation insights, refine articles, search notes, and check vault health in an Obsidian-backed knowledge base.
defaultPrompt: Use Obsidian KB to ingest this source into my knowledge base.
Use Obsidian KB to find related notes before answering.
Use Obsidian KB to distill what we learned in this session.
